settings.label: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and set your preferences.

generalSettings.customize: Customize your setting to enhance your experience.
generalSettings.selectTheme: Select a theme to change the look and feel of your application.
generalSettings.select: Select the language of the application.

profileSettings.description: This is how others will see you

coverProfilePhoto.coverDescription: Upload a cover photo to represent your profile.
coverProfilePhoto.profileDescription: Attach a profile photo to represent your profile.

bio.label: Bio
bio.description: Tell us a little bit about yourself

securitySettings.description: Update your security settings i.e passwords.

oldPass.label: Old Password
oldPass.description: Enter your current password to update your password.

newPass.label: New Password
newPass.description: Your new password must be at least 8 characters long.

confirmPass.label: Confirm Password
confirmPass.description: Your new password and confirm password must match.

errors.newPass: New password must be different from the old password.

invite.label: Invite Friends
invite.description: Invite friends and enjoy this experience of lifetime with your friends
invite.descriptionmodal: Tag your friend email/phone number to join the GolfGuiders.

notification.label: Notification
notification.message: You have {count, plural, =0 {no unread notification} one {# unread notification} other {# unread notifications}}

gc.label: Select a golf course
gc.description: Select a golf course to share your post with golfers and invite buddies to play there

toasts.failPost: An error occurred while creating post.

share.label: Share
share.description: Share on different social medias to get your friends to use GolfGuiders.

posts.readMore: {isRead, select, less {Read Less} more {Read More} other {Read More}}
posts.label: Posts
posts.youAndOther: Liked by you and {count, plural, one {# other} other {# others}}

confirm.description: Are you sure you want to remove this friend?

blockFriend.title: Block List
blockFriend.subtitle: List of users that are blocked by you

confirm.title: Block User
confirm.description: Are you sure you want to block this user? You won't be able to see each other's profiles or send messages.

noInternetPage.title: Oops! No Internet Connection
noInternetPage.subtitle: It looks like you're not connected to the internet. Don't worry, the world of golf is still waiting for you!

download.title: Try Our Mobile App
download.subtitle: Get the full GolfGuiders experience even when your connection is spotty. Download our app for offline features!

wait.label: While you wait, try these tips:

notFoundPage.title: Oops! You're Off Course
notFoundPage.subtitle: Looks like this page took a detour into the rough. Don't worry, even            the pros miss the fairway sometimes!

download.title: Try Our Mobile App
download.subtitle: Get the full GolfGuiders experience even when your connection is spotty. Download our app for offline features!
